race.comment: ALEPPO PINE (1) carries the big weight but it's justified when you sift through his formlines. He returns a gelding and looks to be breathing fire judging by his two sharp jump outs. Expecting a strong return. SIGNATURE SCENT (4) has been only fair in two runs back, though both were against solid Victorian fields. She drops back in trip after a month between runs and should sharpen right up with the blinkers applied. SHOCAP (8) chased gamely behind a smart one in The Mathematician here on Cup Day. She'll have come on nicely with that run under the belt. WILTSHIRE SQUARE (7) finished just behind SHOCAP last time and now meets her 3kg better with the claim, but she probably lacks the same upside. FROTHY MACAW (9) contested good races last prep and has jumped out well in readiness. Blinkers go on and the price looks overs, so she's worth including for some exotic spice.
